title: Creating Branches Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git branch creation concepts.

questions.question: Which command is used to create a new branch in Git?
Which of these Git commands is used to create and switch to a new branch in a single operation?
Regarding Git branching, which approach is more common in modern application development for individual features?
A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
